reviews.comment:
Muy limpia y buena atención.
Hay buena pastelería para desayunar y merendar.
Estacionamiento exclusivo para socios del ACA.
Tiene lugar afuera para tomar mate.

(Translated by Google)
Very clean and good service.
They have good pastries for breakfast and afternoon tea.
Exclusive parking for ACA members.
There's an outdoor area for drinking mate.

reviews.comment:
Muy rico todo..

(Translated by Google)
Everything is very delicious.

reviews.comment:
Carisimooooooo !!! No puede ser q tengan esos precios para un simple café con leche..No se abusen ! el personal de primera !!

(Translated by Google)
So expensive!!! It's unbelievable that they charge such high prices for a simple coffee with milk... Don't take advantage! The staff is excellent!!

reviews.comment:
No pudimos tomar café x q cortaron la luz, raro no tengan un grupo electrógeno, una lastima

(Translated by Google)
We couldn't have coffee because the power went out, it's strange they don't have a generator, a shame.

reviews.comment:
Lo único que no estuvo bien es que el lugar para comprar comidas y bebidas abre recién a la 6:30 hs. Debería funcionar 24 hs.

(Translated by Google)
The only downside is that the place to buy food and drinks doesn't open until 6:30 a.m. It should be open 24 hours.

Nice place and good service for a stop on the way to Rosario

reviews.comment:
Pare para merendar y el cafe con leche es horrible y las medialunas son viejas. Me decepciono totalmente.

(Translated by Google)
I stopped for a snack and the coffee with milk was awful and the croissants were stale. I was completely disappointed.

reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar para almorzar de viaje a Buenos Aires,  todo fresco y rapido

(Translated by Google)
A great place for lunch while traveling to Buenos Aires, everything is fresh and served quickly.

reviews.comment:
Falta mejorar el parque e equipararlo al nivel del ACA de Ing.Maswich que tiene mesas bancos y fogones podrian implementa Proveduria y darnosl la posibilidad a los socios,cuota+$3000=

(Translated by Google)
The park needs improvement and brought up to the level of the ACA in Ing. Maswich, which has tables, benches, and fire pits. They could implement a supply store and give members the possibility of paying their dues + $3000.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlX0tDUUx3EAE

reviews.comment:
Son muy amables en la atención, siempre hacemos una parada en el lugar ...
Los tostados de miga son riquísimos!
Recomiendo probar "ensaimada" una ricura del lugar para acompañar unos mates!

(Translated by Google)
They're very friendly and helpful; we always stop by... Their toasted bread is delicious!
I recommend trying the ensaimada, a local specialty, perfect with some mate!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlbkkyd0RREAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buenos baños. Parque para estirar las piernas en una pequeña caminata y un full para desayunar, almorzar, merendar.
Muy buena la atención.

(Translated by Google)
Very good restrooms. There's a park to stretch your legs on a short walk, and a full-service spa for breakfast, lunch, and a snack.
Very good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlOUphU2F3EAE

reviews.comment:
Por medio de la presente, quiero destacar la limpieza y pulcritud que tienen los baños damas. Es maravilloso! Felicitaciones !!!

(Translated by Google)
I would like to express my gratitude for the cleanliness and tidiness of the ladies' restrooms. It's wonderful! Congratulations!!!
